facilities.name: Cedar Avenue Recycling and Transfer Station

facilities.fees: Fees vary by load type, material, and residency. Confirm current rates before arrival.

facilities.name: Fresno County Environmental Compliance Center
facilities.address: 1327 W Dan Ronquillo Dr, Fresno, CA 93706
facilities.hours: Check Fresno County special waste disposal guidance for current hazardous-waste hours and appointment rules before visiting.
facilities.fees: Household hazardous waste programs are generally resident-focused. Confirm eligibility and limits before arrival.
not_accepted: Materials outside posted household program rules
